name: Google Analytics 4
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost.", "bold": true}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you\u2019re having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Google Analytics collects customer metrics through a number of tracking events, such as add to cart, category/product list views, and order/product details to track conversions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This add-on replaces Maropost\u2019s "}, {"text": "Google Tag Manager"}, {"text": " for eCommerce tracking, but can be run along side your existing Tag Manager/"}, {"text": "Universal Analytics"}, {"text": " if already set up."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Features"}], "data-id": "benefits--features"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Google Analytics 4 is the new default analytics offered by Google, with several advantages over the previous version:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Privacy-focused and durable for the future."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enhanced ecommerce tracking built in! No additional setup required."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Intelligent, using machine learning to unearth insights about the customer journey across platforms and devices."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enhanced, seamless integrations with Google\u2019s advertising platforms to optimise campaign performance and drive greater marketing ROI."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Google Analytics 4 Add-on"}], "data-id": "set-up-the-backup--restore-add-on"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set up a "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9304153#property", "children": [{"text": "Google Analytics 4 Property"}]}, {"text": ". When configuring your Property ensure the \u201cdata stream\u201d is set to "}, {"text": "Web", "bold": true}, {"text": " and you have entered your Maropost webstore URL."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once your data stream is active, copy its "}, {"text": "Measurement ID\u00a0", "bold": true}, {"text": "(including the \u201cG-\u201d prefix) as you will need this later."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Data collection for your Google Analytics 4 Property is handled by the add-on, you do not need any code supplied by Google."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the "}, {"text": "Google Analytics 4", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on under Analytics & Optimisation and click install."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the pop-up window, enter the "}, {"text": "Measurement ID", "bold": true}, {"text": " you copied from your Analytics Dashboard and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your webstore will now start sending ecommerce tracking events such as add to carts, cart/checkout view, and purchases (conversions) to your Google Analytics 4 Dashboard, general page view, and search events."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": While GA4 has some live data, most of the tracking information will take 24 hrs to appear in any reports."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Looking to expand your Google Analytics 4 setup? Your Google Analytics 4 Admin Dashboard allows you to link your "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9379420?hl=en#zippy=,in-this-article", "children": [{"text": "Google Ads account"}]}, {"text": " or turn on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9216061?hl=en", "children": [{"text": "enhanced measurement"}]}, {"text": " events (such as form submissions, file downloads, and more) for your Analytics Property."}]}]
